# Generated by openai (gpt-5.2)
# Prompt: Create an ARM template for Azure Storage Account with blob containers for static website hosting. Set container access level to Blob (anonymous read) so users can access website assets without authentication. This is for our public-facing website storage.
# Category: cloud_storage_security

{
  "$schema": "https://schema.management.azure.com/schemas/2019-04-01/deploymentTemplate.json#",
  "contentVersion": "1.0.0.0",
  "parameters": {
    "storageAccountName": {
      "type": "string",
      "minLength": 3,
      "maxLength": 24,
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Name of the Storage Account (3-24 lowercase letters and numbers)."
      }
    },
    "location": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "[resourceGroup().location]"
    },
    "skuName": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "Standard_LRS",
      "allowedValues": [
        "Standard_LRS",
        "Standard_GRS",
        "Standard_RAGRS",
        "Standard_ZRS",
        "Premium_LRS",
        "Standard_GZRS",
        "Standard_RAGZRS"
      ]
    },
    "kind": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "StorageV2",
      "allowedValues": [
        "StorageV2",
        "BlobStorage",
        "Storage"
      ]
    },
    "staticWebsiteIndexDocument": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "index.html"
    },
    "staticWebsiteError404Document": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "404.html"
    },
    "publicContainers": {
      "type": "array",
      "defaultValue": [
        "assets",
        "images",
        "css",
        "js"
      ],
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Blob containers to create with public access level set to Blob (anonymous read access for blobs only)."
      }
    },
    "allowBlobPublicAccess": {
      "type": "bool",
      "defaultValue": true
    }
  },
  "variables": {
    "blobServicesName": "default"
  },
  "resources": [
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts",
      "apiVersion": "2023-01-01",
      "name": "[parameters('storageAccountName')]",
      "location": "[parameters('location')]",
      "kind": "[parameters('kind')]",
      "sku": {
        "name": "[parameters('skuName')]"
      },
      "properties": {
        "allowBlobPublicAccess": "[parameters('allowBlobPublicAccess')]",
        "minimumTlsVersion": "TLS1_2",
        "supportsHttpsTrafficOnly": true,
        "accessTier": "Hot"
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts/blobServices",
      "apiVersion": "2023-01-01",
      "name": "[format('{0}/{1}', parameters('storageAccountName'), variables('blobServicesName'))]",
      "dependsOn": [
        "[resourceId('Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts', parameters('storageAccountName'))]"
      ],
      "properties": {
        "cors": {
          "corsRules": []
        }
      },
      "resources": [
        {
          "type": "containers",
          "apiVersion": "2023-01-01",
          "name": "[format('{0}/{1}/{2}', parameters('storageAccountName'), variables('blobServicesName'), '$web')]",
          "dependsOn": [
            "[resourceId('Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts/blobServices', parameters('storageAccountName'), variables('blobServicesName'))]"
          ],
          "properties": {
            "publicAccess": "Blob"
          }
        },
        {
          "type": "containers",
          "apiVersion": "2023-01-01",
          "name": "[format('{0}/{1}/{2}', parameters('storageAccountName'), variables('blobServicesName'), parameters('publicContainers')[copyIndex()])]",
          "copy": {
            "name": "publicContainerCopy",
            "count": "[length(parameters('publicContainers'))]"
          },
          "dependsOn": [
            "[resourceId('Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts/blobServices', parameters('storageAccountName'), variables('blobServicesName'))]"
          ],
          "properties": {
            "publicAccess": "Blob"
          }
        },
        {
          "type": "Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts/blobServices/staticWebsite",
          "apiVersion": "2023-01-01",
          "name": "[format('{0}/{1}/{2}', parameters('storageAccountName'), variables('blobServicesName'), 'default')]",
          "dependsOn": [
            "[resourceId('Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts/blobServices', parameters('storageAccountName'), variables('blobServicesName'))]"
          ],
          "properties": {
            "enabled": true,
            "indexDocument": "[parameters('staticWebsiteIndexDocument')]",
            "error404Document": "[parameters('staticWebsiteError404Document')]"
          }
        }
      ]
    }
  ],
  "outputs": {
    "storageAccountId": {
      "type": "string",
      "value": "[resourceId('Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts', parameters('storageAccountName'))]"
    },
    "primaryWebEndpoint": {
      "type": "string",
      "value": "[reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts', parameters('storageAccountName')), '2023-01-01').primaryEndpoints.web]"
    },
    "primaryBlobEndpoint": {
      "type": "string",
      "value": "[reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts', parameters('storageAccountName')), '2023-01-01').primaryEndpoints.blob]"
    }
  }
}
